headerDisplay: 1C Matter - Xiaomi 1C Vacuum (Matter Native - Local LAN)

name.title: Display Name
name.description: The name shown for the vacuum in Homebridge and Apple Home.

ip.title: Device IP Address
ip.description: The local IP address of your 1C vacuum (e.g., 192.168.1.50).

token.title: Device Token
token.description: The 32-character local token for your vacuum.

deviceId.title: Device ID (DID)
deviceId.description: The numeric Device ID of your vacuum (needed for local MIoT commands).

pollInterval.title: Polling Interval (seconds)
pollInterval.description: How often to refresh vacuum status. Commands trigger an additional fast refresh.

connectAttempts.title: Connection Attempts
connectAttempts.description: How many local UDP retries to make before giving up on a command or status read.

enableConsumableLogs.title: Log Consumable Status
enableConsumableLogs.description: Log filter and brush life when values change.

lowConsumableThreshold.title: Low Consumable Warning Threshold (%)
lowConsumableThreshold.description: Warn when filter or brush life is at or below this percentage.

enableRoomCleaning.title: Enable Room Cleaning (Experimental)
enableRoomCleaning.description: EXPERIMENTAL: expose the rooms configured below as Matter service areas so a controller can start a room-by-room clean. Requires the vacuum to have a saved map with segmented rooms; on firmware that does not persist maps this may not work. Leave off to keep the plugin's default behaviour unchanged.

rooms.title: Rooms
rooms.description: Segment/room IDs from your vacuum's saved map, paired with friendly names. Only used when Room Cleaning is enabled.

id.title: Room ID
id.description: Numeric segment/room ID from the vacuum map (discoverable via the Mi Home app or a one-time cloud map dump).

name.title: Name
name.description: Friendly name shown in your controller (e.g. Kitchen).

roomCleanRepeats.title: Room Clean Repeats
roomCleanRepeats.description: How many times to clean each selected room per run.

roomCleanSuction.title: Room Clean Suction Level
roomCleanSuction.description: Suction level used during room cleaning (0 Quiet, 1 Default, 2 Medium, 3 Strong).
